regressions.description: Dependent-image builds must bind package manifests and image metadata to the current phase tag, not the phase 10 tag.

Dependent-image Docker apt setup must use bounded retries against the pinned Noble snapshot, treat partial snapshot indexes as errors, prove the pinned ca-certificates and requested dependent package versions are visible, and avoid live-mirror, Launchpad, local .deb, or generated-package fallbacks that mask the committed package closure.
